name: Add Parts menu is hidden for user without create permission
steps:
Given a user without 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in
When the user navigates to the Parts view
Then the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu is not visible above the parts table

name: Add Parts menu is visible to user with create permission
steps:
Given a user with 'create' permission for the Part permission group is logged in
When the user navigates to the Parts view
Then the 'Add Parts' dropdown menu is visible above the parts table
